mapper.select: SELECT fs.id, fs.user_id, u.name AS userName, fs.item_id, fs.mode, fs.goal, fs.planned_duration, fs.actual_duration, fs.pause_duration, fs.status, fs.is_completed, fs.start_time, fs.end_time, fs.create_time FROM focus_session fs, user u WHERE fs.user_id = u.id ORDER BY fs.start_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM focus_session WHERE id IN
#{id}
